arts.ttl: Talks held: Arsenal prioritise top striker target – and it’s not Viktor Gyokeres
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly held talks over the potential transfer of Viktor Gyokeres, though their top target remains RB Leipzig front-man Benjamin Sesko. Gyokeres has been in sensational form for Sporting Lisbon, scoring a remarkable 70 goals in just 75 games since joining them last season, and it seems only a matter of time before the […] The post Talks held: Arsenal prioritise top striker target – and it’s not Viktor Gyokeres appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Viktor Gyokeres claims as '£50m deal agreed'
arts.sum: Arsenal could be set for a busy January transfer window, with the Gunners expected to strengthen their squad next month and also ship out some of their fringe players
